fn id[cap c](a: A): A / { ..c } { a }
---
id : fn(A) -> A
==========
cap IO { fn op(): Result }
fn with_io[cap c](): Result / { ..c, IO } { IO.op }
---
with_io : fn() -> Result / {IO[IO]}
==========
cap E1 { fn op1(): A }
cap E2 { fn op2(): B }
fn with_both[cap c](): A / { ..c, E1, E2 } { E1.op1 }
---
with_both : fn() -> A / {E1[E1], E2[E2]}
==========
fn pure_fn[cap c](a: A): A / { ..c } { a }
fn caller(x: A): A / {} { pure_fn(x) }
---
pure_fn : fn(A) -> A
caller : fn(A) -> A
